name: edgeR Pseudobulk Differential Expression

cell_type_key.guidance: obs column with cell type labels.

min_cells_per_pseudobulk.guidance: Minimum cells to form a valid pseudobulk sample.

test_method.guidance: Quasi-likelihood F-test (QLF) is preferred for small sample sizes typical in scRNA-seq. LRT (likelihood ratio test) is an alternative.

outputs.de_results: DataFrame per cell type with gene, logFC, PValue, FDR
outputs.n_de_genes: Number of significant DE genes per cell type

validation.check: At least 2 biological replicates per condition per cell type.

notes: Same critical pseudobulk requirement as DESeq2. edgeR QLF-test is slightly more conservative than DESeq2 for small sample sizes and may be preferred when n < 5 per condition.
